zh.name: 万艺雕塑
zh.description: 万艺雕塑是一家专业从事大型雕塑设计、制作、施工和安装的全流程服务公司。我们拥有一支经验丰富的设计团队和技术精湛的制作团队，致力于为客户打造独特、高质量的雕塑作品。
zh.history: 公司成立于2005年，经过多年的发展，已完成了众多国内外大型雕塑项目，赢得了客户的广泛认可和好评。
zh.mission: 我们的使命是通过艺术创造，为城市和空间增添独特的文化魅力。
zh.vision: 成为国际一流的雕塑艺术公司，引领行业发展。

en.name: Wanyi Sculpture
en.description: Wanyi Sculpture is a professional company engaged in the whole process of large-scale sculpture design, production, construction and installation. We have an experienced design team and skilled production team, dedicated to creating unique, high-quality sculpture works for customers.
en.history: Founded in 2005, after years of development, the company has completed many large-scale sculpture projects at home and abroad, winning wide recognition and praise from customers.
en.mission: Our mission is to add unique cultural charm to cities and spaces through artistic creation.
en.vision: To become a world-class sculpture art company and lead the industry development.
